properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 54/18

NORWEGIAN SEA
ANDOEYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT TEST AND TRAINING OF MILITARY SYSTEMS 
FROM ANDOEYA. IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM 30-31 MAY 2018.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC ARE REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND STAY OUTSIDE THE 
FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS DURING THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIODS.
DANGER AREA
A. 69-01.5N 15-29.4E
B. 69-03.2N 14-32.0E
C. 69-29.0N 14-32.0E
D. 69-29.0N 15-45.3E
E. 69-11.4N 15-49.4E
F. 69-01.5N 15-29.4E
ACTIVISATION OF DANGER AREA 3 (NORDMELA): 30-31 MAY 16:00-22:00 UTC
